Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class FinanceTransaction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.FinanceTransaction
public class FinanceTransaction extends SObject

Java class for FinanceTransaction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FinanceTransaction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BaseCurrencyAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BaseCurrencyBalance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BaseCurrencyFxDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BaseCurrencyFxRate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BaseCurrencyIsoCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChargeAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreationMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DueDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EffectiveDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceBalanceSnapshots" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceSystemIntegrationMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceSystemIntegrationStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceSystemName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceSystemTransactionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceTransactionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImpactAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LegalEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}LegalEntity" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LegalEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalCreditGlAccountName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalCreditGlAccountNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalDebitGlAccountName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalDebitGlAccountNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalEventAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalEventType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalFinanceBookName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalFinancePeriodEndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalFinancePeriodName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalFinancePeriodStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalFinancePeriodStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalGlRuleName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalGlTreatmentName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OriginalReferenceEntityType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentReferenceEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentReferenceEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceEntityType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResultingBalance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subtotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmountWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TransactionDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
